summary: Tested Strategy Leaderboard feature (iteration 66). All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. The /strategies route renders StrategyLeaderboardPage with all 7 public strategies displayed in a sortable table. Sorting by Return, Sharpe, Win Rate, and Max DD works correctly with toggle between asc/desc. View buttons navigate to /marketplace/{id} strategy detail pages. 'View Full Leaderboard' button on landing page (under Featured Strategies) correctly links to /strategies. Copy Strategy button visible when logged in.
critical_code_review_comments: Leaderboard endpoint at /api/marketplace/strategies/leaderboard correctly placed before /{strategy_id} route to avoid route conflicts
60-second cache TTL implemented for leaderboard data
Sorting works for all 4 metrics: total_return, sharpe_ratio, win_rate, max_drawdown
Invalid sort_by parameter correctly defaults to total_return
All strategies have _perf data enriched from strategy_performance collection
StrategyLeaderboardPage.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Loading skeletons render while data loads (RowSkeleton component)
View Full Leaderboard button correctly placed under FeaturedStrategies section
seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data: 3 featured strategies (Alpha Momentum BTC, ETH Reversal Sniper, SOL Breakout Pulse) + 4 pre-existing strategies (BTC Momentum Alpha, SOL Trend Follower, Multi-Asset Arbitrage, ETH Scalping Bot)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 tested Strategy Leaderboard at /strategies route. All 7 public strategies display with rank, name, risk badge, return%, sharpe, win rate, max drawdown, category, and View button. Sorting by clicking column headers works (toggles asc/desc). View buttons navigate to /marketplace/{id}. 'View Full Leaderboard' button on landing page links to /strategies. Note: Nav 'Leaderboard' link goes to /leaderboard (Strategy Lab), not /strategies (Marketplace) - these are different features.

tests_executed.test: GET /api/marketplace/strategies/leaderboard returns 200
Leaderboard returns strategies array with total count
Leaderboard has at least 7 public strategies
All strategies have _perf data with performance metrics
All strategies have required fields (id, name, creator_name, category, status, is_public)
Default sort is by total_return descending
Sort by sharpe_ratio ascending works
Sort by sharpe_ratio descending works
Sort by win_rate descending works
Sort by win_rate ascending works
Sort by max_drawdown descending works
Sort by max_drawdown ascending works
Invalid sort_by defaults to total_return
Featured strategies (Alpha Momentum BTC, ETH Reversal Sniper, SOL Breakout Pulse) in leaderboard
Pre-existing strategies (BTC Momentum Alpha, SOL Trend Follower, Multi-Asset Arbitrage, ETH Scalping Bot) in leaderboard
Strategy detail accessible from leaderboard
Health endpoint works (regression)
Featured endpoint returns 3 strategies (regression)
Marketplace strategies list works (regression)
Login works with test credentials (regression)
Frontend: /strategies route renders StrategyLeaderboardPage with data-testid
Frontend: Leaderboard table shows 7 strategies with all columns
Frontend: Clicking column headers toggles sort direction
Frontend: View button navigates to /marketplace/{id}
Frontend: Strategy detail page shows name, performance, parameters
Frontend: Copy Strategy button visible when logged in
Frontend: Landing page has 'View Full Leaderboard' button under Featured Strategies
Frontend: 'View Full Leaderboard' button links to /strategies
Frontend: Featured Strategies section shows 3 cards (no regression)
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero section (no regression)

mocked_apis.note: As per main agent context - Binance Testnet orders are simulated
